message:
fix: even pane distribution for tmux split-window

Standard tmux split-window cascades pane sizes (each split halves the
current pane). This makes tools that create multiple splits produce
progressively smaller panes.

- Remove dimension halving in tmux split handler (match web UI behavior,
  let CSS flex and ResizeObserver handle actual sizing)
- Add applyEvenLayout to Layout that computes ratio = left_leaves /
  total_leaves at each split node, giving all panes equal space
- Auto-apply even layout on tmux-initiated splits (processed on main
  thread before layout broadcast to avoid race condition)
- Add select-layout support to tmux shim (tiled, even-horizontal,
  even-vertical) for explicit use by tools
